description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on pull requests, pushes to main and version tags, on workflow dispatch, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow consists of two jobs: get-envlist and test. The get-envlist job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, installs tox-gh-matrix, and generates a tox environment list. The test job uses the generated environment list to run tests in a matrix strategy with fail-fast set to false, allowing for some tests to fail.
